# HT Hair Transplant Clinic (besthairlahore.com)

Welcome to the LLM-readable directory for HT Hair Transplant, a premium hair restoration and aesthetic clinic based in DHA, Lahore, Pakistan. Led by clinical lead Dr. Asif Ameer.

## Core Information
- **Official Domain**: https://www.besthairlahore.com/
- **Brand Name**: HT Hair Transplant
- **Services**: Surgical Hair Restoration (FUE, DHI, Sapphire FUE, Beard, Eyebrow, Female Restoration, Hairline Design), and Non-Surgical Treatments (PRP Therapy, Scalp Micropigmentation, Exosomes, skincare).
- **Locations**: Lahore (DHA), Karachi, Islamabad, Rawalpindi, Faisalabad.
- **Contact Phone**: +92 300 4610777 (WhatsApp: https://wa.me/923004610777)
- **Email**: info@htaesthetics.com
- **Operating Hours**: Monday–Friday 10:00 AM – 8:00 PM (PKT).

## Site Structure & Core Pages
- **Home Page** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/index.html): Explains clinical indicators, doctor reviews, why choose cards, and features an interactive before-after slider (FUE 3200 grafts and DHI 2500 grafts).
- **About Us** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/about.html): Mission, vision, core doctor records, and clinical accreditations of Dr. Asif Ameer.
- **Services Hub** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/services.html): Complete treatments layout with detailed procedures for FUE, DHI, PRP, and skincare.
- **Cost Guide** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/hair-transplant-cost-pakistan.html): Graft-based pricing tables and package comparisons for FUE and DHI in Pakistan.
- **FAQ Hub** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/faqs.html): Conversational Q&A answering graft density, cost queries, pain thresholds, and recovery details.
- **Contact** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/contact.html): Addresses, direct phone lines, map iframe coordinates, and enquiry forms.
- **Graft Calculator** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/graft-calculator.html): Interactive tool to estimate graft requirements based on Norwood scale stages.
- **Statistics & Clinical Data** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/statistics.html): Clinical data, success rates, graft survival ratios, and cost comparisons.

## Surgical Pillar Pages
- **Hair Transplant** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/hair-transplant.html): Comprehensive surgical guide comparing FUE vs DHI, detailing graft mapping, density targets, and clinical success factors.
- **FUE Hair Transplant** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/fue-hair-transplant.html): In-depth walkthrough of Follicular Unit Extraction, micro-punch graft harvesting, and donor area management.
- **DHI Hair Transplant** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/dhi-hair-transplant.html): Direct Hair Implantation details using specialized Choi Implanter Pens for direct graft placement, angle precision, and density.
- **Sapphire FUE** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/sapphire-fue-transplant.html): Guide to FUE using Sapphire gemstone blades, micro-incision openings, and accelerated recovery profiles.
- **Beard Transplant** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/beard-transplant.html): Detailed restoration procedures for beards, moustaches, and sideburns, including graft orientation and density mapping.
- **Eyebrow Transplant** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/eyebrow-transplant.html): Micrografting protocols for thin or scarred eyebrows, single-hair alignment, and styling.
- **Female Hair Transplant** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/female-hair-transplant.html): Custom hair restoration guides for women, focusing on Ludwig pattern treatment and non-shaven FUE (U-FUE).
- **Hairline Restoration** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/hairline-restoration.html): The artistic science of hairline design, temporal point restoration, and graft distribution matching facial aesthetics.

## Non-Surgical Treatment Pages
- **Exosome Hair Treatment** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/exosome-hair-treatment.html): Advanced biotechnology for cellular hair restoration using cell-free exosome serum, mRNA, and growth factors to trigger dormant follicle growth.
- **PRP Therapy** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/prp-therapy.html): Platelet-Rich Plasma protocols for hair thinning, spin cycles, growth factors, and scheduling.
- **Laser Hair Removal** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/laser-hair-removal.html): High-precision cosmetic laser therapies (Diode and Nd:YAG) for permanent hair reduction across various body zones and skin tones.
- **Hair Loss Treatment** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/hair-loss-treatment.html): Non-surgical hair loss management, DHT blockers, clinical topicals, and medical assessments.
- **Scalp Micropigmentation** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/scalp-micropigmentation.html): Scalp tattoo shading and pigmentation guidelines, hair follicle simulation, and ink matching.

## Social Proof & Post-Op Guidance
- **Before & After** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/before-after.html): Interactive visual results, graft timelines (Day 1 to Month 12), and patient case studies.
- **Gallery** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/gallery.html): Photos of HT Hair Transplant clinic interior, operating theaters, sterilization systems, and patient consultations.
- **Reviews** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/reviews.html): Compilation of patient testimonies, Google reviews, success stories, and surgeon endorsements.
- **Recovery** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/recovery.html): Detailed post-operative care timelines, wash instructions, sleeping guides, scabbing stages, and shock loss guides.
